_comment: Gold variant styling. Layout defined in .bin/regen_slots.json. For button_grid, default_button, default_item, and item_overrides details, see .bin/DEFAULTS.md under Slots Configuration.

default_button._comment: See .bin/DEFAULTS.md: Slots Configuration > default_button. Uses button atlas row 1, col 1 with gold gradient.

default_item._comment: See .bin/DEFAULTS.md: Slots Configuration > default_item. Items tiled at 28px with slight transparency.
